# PuCheckbox

## Intent

- checkbox
- boolean selection
- multi-select option

## Prefer When

- Use for an individual boolean or multi-select choice.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for exclusive choices; use PuTabs or PuPicker depending on context.

## Import

```ts
import { PuCheckbox } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
